p.description: Processing time of the k-th operation of job j

Om.description: Machine index assigned to the k-th operation of job j

S.description: Start time of the k-th operation of job j

y.description: 1 if operation (j1,k1) is scheduled before (j2,k2) on their shared machine, 0 otherwise; indexed over conflict pairs P

C_max.description: Makespan: completion time of the last operation across all jobs

constraints.description: Technological ordering: each operation in a job must start after the previous operation finishes.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(S[j, k+1] >= S[j, k] + p[j][k] for j in range(n) for k in range(m-1))

constraints.description: Machine non-overlap (forward): if y=1, operation (j1,k1) precedes (j2,k2) on their shared machine.

code.gurobipy:
for (j1, k1), (j2, k2) in pairs:
    model.addConstr(S[j1, k1] + p[j1][k1] <= S[j2, k2] + M_big * (1 - y[j1, k1, j2, k2]))

constraints.description: Machine non-overlap (reverse): if y=0, operation (j2,k2) precedes (j1,k1) on their shared machine.

code.gurobipy:
for (j1, k1), (j2, k2) in pairs:
    model.addConstr(S[j2, k2] + p[j2][k2] <= S[j1, k1] + M_big * y[j1, k1, j2, k2])

constraints.description: Makespan lower bound: the makespan is at least the completion time of each job's last operation.

code.gurobipy: model.addConstrs(C_max >= S[j, m-1] + p[j][m-1] for j in range(n))

constraints.description: Machine Critical-Path Bound (EC2): with head h_{j,k}=sum_{t<k} p_{j,t} and tail tau_{j,k}=sum_{t>k} p_{j,t}, the makespan is at least CP_m for each machine m.
constraints.formulation: \texttt{CP}_m := \sum_{(j,k)\in O_m} p_{j,k} + \min_{(j,k)\in O_m} h_{j,k} + \min_{(j,k)\in O_m} \tau_{j,k}, \quad C_{\max} \ge \texttt{CP}_m \quad \forall m

code.gurobipy:
for machine in range(m):
    ops_m = [(j, k) for j in range(n) for k in range(m) if Om[j][k] == machine]
    load_m = sum(p[j][k] for j, k in ops_m)
    min_head = min(sum(p[j][t] for t in range(k)) for j, k in ops_m)
    min_tail = min(sum(p[j][t] for t in range(k + 1, m)) for j, k in ops_m)
    model.addConstr(C_max >= load_m + min_head + min_tail)
